## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the design system (no hardcoded colors, no gradients, tokens only)
- [ ] All conditional classNames use `cx()`, not template literals
- [ ] No unused imports
- [ ] No `any` types or `@ts-ignore`
- [ ] Self-contained, no external state or fetch calls
- [ ] Renders without errors at the preview route
